attestation_note: Three errors corrected: McKinsey title was promoted from 'Product Analyst Intern' to 'Product Analyst Co-op' in the extracted draft (it is a co-op, not an internship, but the agent also dropped the 'Co-op' framing inconsistently across fields); Avo Automation end date was extracted as 'June 2025' instead of the correct June 2024; the agent inferred a 'Cloud Architecture' skill at expert level from one Terraform/Packer side project, which overstates actual depth.
summary: Product Manager with 3+ years of experience building AI-enabled and automation-driven products from zero to scale. Track record of turning ambiguous problems into shipped products that reduce manual effort, automate complex workflows, and drive measurable business outcomes across engineering, design, and data teams.

experience.title: Product Analyst Co-op (Intern)
highlights: Enabled leadership to prioritize roadmap by defining 50+ feature-level KPIs and building an end-to-end Snowflake to Power BI streaming pipeline that gave stakeholders live visibility into product performance

Informed quarterly product planning by analyzing engagement across 100+ metrics using Heap Analytics, surfacing adoption gaps and recommending targeted feature optimizations that shaped the next release cycle

Reduced manual analysis effort by 60% by partnering with product and data teams to build an AI analytics agent on Snowflake Cortex that translated natural language queries into validated SQL using an LLM-as-judge layer
experience.verifiable_via: Offer letter / co-op placement record, LinkedIn

experience.title: Product Engineer -> Senior Product Engineer
highlights: Cut total manual effort by 90% by leading AI enablement of the product end to end: ran discovery across the full user journey to identify the highest-friction bottlenecks, defined the roadmap, and led 6 engineers and 2 designers from spec to delivery
Drove 33% expansion in clientele by digging into client-specific workflows, identifying underserved use cases, and building tailored roadmaps, pricing strategies, and user journeys for each segment
Reduced churn by 50% by owning the feedback loop with stakeholders and clients, triaging issues across 100+ product features, and closing gaps between what was shipped and what users actually needed
Drove 15% revenue gain in 6 months by shipping 50+ features and fixes, moving fast without breaking quality on a product used across enterprise workflows
experience.verifiable_via: Former manager reference, LinkedIn employment history

projects.name: Nourish Agent
projects.description: AI Nutritionist that Predicts and Mitigates Stress Eating
highlights: Shipped a chat-first AI nutritionist that adapts meal and nutrient recommendations in real time using live wearable data synced in the background
Reduced recommendation drift across 25+ daily nutrient targets by designing a multi-agent architecture with three independent specialist agents for nutrition, scheduling, and wearable sync
Predicts stress eating risk by analyzing vitals, sleep, and last meal together, then proactively suggests preventive meals

projects.name: RohBot
projects.description: AI Voice Agent that Turns a Portfolio into a Conversation
highlights: Converted a static portfolio into a live voice conversation that answers questions, qualifies opportunities, and books calls in real time
Built on ElevenLabs Conversational AI with a cloned voice and RAG over case study documents, with browser-side actions and n8n workflows connected to Google Calendar and Gmail
Secured the public agent against abuse with webhook authentication, ElevenLabs prompt-injection guardrails, locked client-side config, and rate-limited endpoints

projects.name: SwiftHire
projects.description: Job Application Automation via Multi-Agent Pipeline
highlights: Cut job application time by 25% and manual effort by 80% with an automated apply pipeline
Built a 5-agent pipeline: JD extraction and resume tailoring via Claude, PDF compilation, recruiter email lookup via Hunter.io, outreach drafting, and application form filling
Automated job discovery by monitoring ATS platforms for new postings and sending real-time notifications

projects.name: SupportIQ
projects.description: MCP-Enabled RAG Pipeline for Internal Knowledge Retrieval
highlights: Built a semantic search system over 160 internal documents to resolve tickets end to end
Ingested and embedded source documents using Voyage AI into Pinecone, with Claude synthesizing grounded cited answers from retrieved passages at query time

projects.name: Automated Software Deployment Pipeline (CI/CD)
highlights: Built a CI/CD pipeline on GitHub Actions that gates every merge with automated testing, security scanning, and observability checks
Provisioned distributed infrastructure across GCP and AWS using Terraform and Packer: EC2 behind a load balancer with auto-scaling, RDS on isolated VPCs, S3 for storage, and GCE for compute

education.degree: Master of Science in Information Systems

education.institution: The LNM Institute of Information Technology
education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science and Engineering
